meaning: n.依推测的估计,瞎猜v.估计
examples: The 30 percent figure may be no more than a guesstimate.
Can you give a guesstimate of how much it will cost to fix my car?
So supposed that this one — I'll just guesstimate, this one feels heavier.
The calculator starts with a personal assessment, and a detailed questionnaire to guesstimate your retirement expenses.
But the embassy's own guesstimate is that the unofficial figure is now as high as 200, 000.
